title: paraprasophyllum argillaceum
intro: Paraprasophyllum argillaceum, also known as the Yellowhooded Midge Orchid, is a species of orchid found in the southern regions of Australia. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat respiratory issues and inflammation due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits in reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the Paraprasophyllum argillaceum are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
